ddls:
CREATE TABLE "classroom" (
  "building" TEXT /* The name of the building where the classroom is located. */,
  "room_number" INTEGER /* The room number of the classroom. */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* The maximum number of students the classroom can accommodate. */,
  "classroom_type" TEXT /* Type of classroom (e.g., lecture hall, lab, seminar room). */,
  "technology_features" TEXT /* Features available in the classroom (e.g., projector, smart board, internet). */,
  "accessibility_features" TEXT /* Accessibility features (e.g., wheelchair access, hearing assistance). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building", "room_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "department" (
  "dept_name" TEXT /* The name of the academic department. */,
  "head_instructor" TEXT /* The name of the head instructor or professor in charge of the department. */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for the department. */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the department. */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department (e.g., building and room number). */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the department's website. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "course" (
  "course_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each course. */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* The name of the course. */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Reference to the department offering the course. */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits awarded for the course. */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered (e.g., Fall, Spring, Summer). */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the course is offered. */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisite courses required for enrollment. */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course. */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the course. */,
  "instructor" TEXT /* Name of the instructor teaching the course. */,
  "classroom_building" TEXT /* Building where the classroom is located. */,
  "classroom_room_number" INTEGER /* Room number of the classroom where the course is held. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_classroom_room_number FOREIGN KEY ("classroom_room_number") REFERENCES classroom ("room_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_dept_name FOREIGN KEY ("dept_name") REFERENCES department ("dept_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_classroom_building FOREIGN KEY ("classroom_building") REFERENCES classroom ("building")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructor" (
  "instructor_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each instructor. */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor. */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Reference to the department the instructor belongs to. */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor. */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor. */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor (e.g., building and room number). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "section" (
  "section_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each section. */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* Reference to the course for which the section is offered. */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the section is offered (e.g., Fall, Spring, Summer). */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the section is offered. */,
  "instructor_id" TEXT /* Reference to the instructor teaching the section. */,
  "classroom_building" TEXT /* Building where the classroom is located. */,
  "classroom_room_number" INTEGER /* Room number of the classroom where the section is held. */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the section. */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the section. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_section_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructor ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_section_classroom_room_number FOREIGN KEY ("classroom_room_number") REFERENCES classroom ("room_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_section_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES course ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_section_classroom_building FOREIGN KEY ("classroom_building") REFERENCES classroom ("building")
)
